title: Dantian Critical Report
description: Simplified, human-readable trust summary generated by the Light Auditor from existing certification data. Designed for consumers making trust decisions about AI agents.

source.description: Where the agent lives: repo URL, API endpoint, or platform

description.description: What the agent claims to do

claimedCapabilities.description: Skills the agent claims, pulled from its README, manifest, or declared capabilities

skillsPassed.description: Number of claimed skills that passed verification

skillsPartial.description: Number of skills with partial pass

skillsFailed.description: Number of skills that failed verification

keyFindings.description: 3-5 plain-language findings from the most recent audit. No jargon. Each finding is one sentence.

trustScore.description: Overall trust score from the most recent audit

trustExplanation.description: One sentence explaining the trust score in plain language

lastAuditDate.description: When the last audit was conducted

expiresAt.description: When the certification expires. Null if denied.

certifier.description: Name of the certifier or certifying organization

summary.description: One-sentence recommendation. Format: 'Safe to use for [purpose]' / 'Use with caution: [concern]' / 'Not recommended: [reason]'

concerns.description: Specific concerns to be aware of. Each is one plain-language sentence.

generatedAt.description: When this Critical Report was generated

disclaimer.description: Standard disclaimer about the report being a summary, not a new audit
